vocab.example: 你可以拨打热线向专业人士求助。
我们必须学会控制自己的情绪。
妈妈准备了一顿丰盛的晚餐。

vocab.meaning: Pick up with chopsticks / Press from both sides
vocab.example: 他夹了一块肉放进口里。
妈妈唠叨也是为了我们好。
他拿刷子把鞋子刷干净。
我们要珍惜现在的幸福生活。
我们不应该嘲笑别人的缺点。
他弯腰捡起了地上的垃圾。
做错了事，他感到非常惭愧。
我们要学会感恩所拥有的一切。
这是一段令人难忘的回忆。
农夫在田里辛勤地耕种。
戴隐形眼镜要注意卫生。
打电脑游戏很容易上瘾。

sentences.text: 我没带雨伞，结果被淋成了落汤鸡。
sentences.description: Drenched like a soaked chicken after forgetting an umbrella.

sentences.text: 我家附近的公园鸟语花香，风景宜人。
sentences.description: A nearby park with singing birds, fragrant flowers, and pleasant scenery.

sentences.text: 听了妈妈的话，我鼻子一酸，眼泪流了下来。
sentences.description: Feeling touched and tearful after hearing mom's words.

sentences.text: 他们俩你一句，我一句，脸红脖子粗地争吵起来。
sentences.description: Argued heatedly back and forth until turning red in the face.

sentences.text: 小光和小华是一对形影不离的好朋友，他们志同道合，无话不谈。
sentences.description: Inseparable best friends sharing the same ideals and talking about everything.

热线.zh: 如果你遇到任何心理困难，可以随时拨打这条热线寻求帮助。
热线.en: If you encounter any psychological difficulties, you can call this hotline for help at any time.

热线.zh: 社区为了方便居民反映日常生活问题，特别设立了一条求助热线。
热线.en: The community specifically set up a hotline to make it convenient for residents to report daily life problems.

热线.zh: 这条心理咨询热线每天二十四小时都有专业的志愿者在线值班。
热线.en: This psychological counseling hotline has professional volunteers on duty twenty-four hours a day.

热线.zh: 节目播出之后，许多热情的观众纷纷打来热线电话表达支持。
热线.en: After the show aired, many enthusiastic viewers called the hotline one after another to express their support.

热线.zh: 警方公布了防诈骗热线，希望市民能够提高警惕防止上当受骗。
热线.en: The police released an anti-fraud hotline, hoping that citizens can heighten their vigilance to prevent being scammed.

控制.zh: 当你感到非常生气的时候，一定要学会控制好自己的脾气。
控制.en: When you feel very angry, you must learn to control your temper well.

控制.zh: 消防员经过几个小时的努力，终于把森林里的大火控制住了。
控制.en: After hours of effort, the firefighters finally brought the forest fire under control.

控制.zh: 医生建议他在日常饮食中控制糖分的摄入，以保持身体健康。
控制.en: The doctor advised him to control his sugar intake in his daily diet to stay healthy.

控制.zh: 面对突发状况，他依然能够保持冷静并有效地控制住局势。
控制.en: Faced with a sudden situation, he was still able to remain calm and effectively control the situation.

控制.zh: 我们不应该被手机和社交媒体控制，要学会合理安排时间。
控制.en: We shouldn't be controlled by phones and social media; we need to learn to manage our time reasonably.

丰盛.zh: 妈妈为全家人准备了一顿非常丰盛且营养美味的晚餐。
丰盛.en: Mom prepared a very sumptuous, nutritious, and delicious dinner for the whole family.

丰盛.zh: 在除夕夜的饭桌上，摆满了各种各样丰盛的年夜饭菜肴。
丰盛.en: On the Chinese New Year's Eve dinner table, various rich Reunion Dinner dishes were laid out.

丰盛.zh: 酒店为远道而来的贵宾准备了极其丰盛的自助早餐。
丰盛.en: The hotel prepared an extremely rich buffet breakfast for the distinguished guests coming from afar.

丰盛.zh: 经过长途拔涉之后，大家享用了一顿丰盛的午餐恢复体力。
丰盛.en: After a long trek, everyone enjoyed a sumptuous lunch to regain their strength.

丰盛.zh: 农夫们辛勤劳作了一整年，终于迎来了无比丰盛的收成。
丰盛.en: The farmers worked hard all year and finally welcomed a very bountiful harvest.

夹.zh: 他用筷子夹起一块新鲜的鱼肉放到奶奶的碗里面。
夹.en: He used chopsticks to pick up a piece of fresh fish and put it into grandma's bowl.

夹.zh: 请你小心一点，不要在关门的时候把手指头给夹伤了。
夹.en: Please be careful not to pinch your fingers when closing the door.

夹.zh: 他把重要的小便条夹在课本里面，防止自己一不小心忘记。
夹.en: He sandwiched the important small note inside the textbook to prevent himself from accidentally forgetting.

夹.zh: 老师手上夹着一本厚厚的教学资料走进了安静的教室。
夹.en: The teacher walked into the quiet classroom holding a thick pile of teaching materials under his arm.

夹.zh: 汉堡包中间夹着新鲜的蔬菜以及香喷喷的牛肉饼。
夹.en: Fresh vegetables and a delicious beef patty are sandwiched inside the burger.

唠叨.zh: 虽然妈妈总是喜欢唠叨，但我知道她这全都是为了我好。
唠叨.en: Although mom always likes to nag, I know that she is doing it entirely for my own good.

唠叨.zh: 你已经不是小孩子了，不要让父母总是为你唠叨不停。
唠叨.en: You are no longer a child; don't make your parents nag at you all the time.

唠叨.zh: 出门前奶奶不停地唠叨，提醒我一定要记得带好雨伞。
唠叨.en: Before I went out, grandma nagged endlessly, reminding me to make sure to bring an umbrella.

唠叨.zh: 他非常讨厌别人在他耳边唠叨那些早就听过的旧道理。
唠叨.en: He really hates people nagging in his ear about old truths he has heard long ago.

唠叨.zh: 听到父母关切的唠叨，远在异国他乡的他感到非常温暖。
唠叨.en: Hearing his parents' caring nagging, he felt very warm while far away in a foreign land.

刷子.zh: 他拿起一把小刷子，仔细地清扫着桌子上的旧灰尘。
刷子.en: He picked up a small brush and carefully cleaned away the old dust on the table.

刷子.zh: 刷鞋之前要先用刷子把上面的泥土彻底清洗干净才行。
刷子.en: Before brushing your shoes, you need to use a brush to clean off the dirt completely first.

刷子.zh: 油漆工人拿着大刷子，把墙壁均匀地刷上了新的颜色。
刷子.en: The painter held a big brush and evenly painted the wall with a new color.

刷子.zh: 美术老师教我们如何使用不同大小的刷子去画出风景。
刷子.en: The art teacher taught us how to use brushes of different sizes to paint landscapes.

刷子.zh: 这把清洁刷子专门用来清洗厨房里那些难以清理的油污。
刷子.en: This cleaning brush is specially used to clean difficult oil stains in the kitchen.

珍惜.zh: 我们一定要懂得珍惜时间，不要把宝贵的青春白白浪费掉。
珍惜.en: We must know how to cherish time and not waste our precious youth in vain.

珍惜.zh: 经过那次误会之后，他们两个人变得更加珍惜彼此的友谊。
珍惜.en: After that misunderstanding, the two of them came to cherish their friendship even more.

珍惜.zh: 水资源非常宝贵，我们在日常生活中必须要学会珍惜节约。
珍惜.en: Water resources are extremely precious; we must learn to cherish and save water in daily life.

珍惜.zh: 能够拥有这么好的学习环境，大家一定要好好地珍惜才行。
珍惜.en: Being able to have such a good learning environment, everyone must cherish it well.

珍惜.zh: 他非常珍惜这次来之不易的出国交流和学习的好机会。
珍惜.en: He deeply cherishes this hard-won opportunity to go abroad for exchange and study.

嘲笑.zh: 看到同学在跑步时摔倒，我们绝对不应该去嘲笑他。
嘲笑.en: When seeing a classmate fall while running, we should definitely not laugh at him.

嘲笑.zh: 面对别人的嘲笑与质问，他并没有放弃自己的理想。
嘲笑.en: In the face of other people's mockery and questioning, he did not give up on his ideal.

嘲笑.zh: 乱嘲笑别人的缺陷是一种非常没有礼貌和修养的行为。
嘲笑.en: Carelessly mocking other people's flaws is a very impolite and uncultured behavior.

嘲笑.zh: 勇敢地表达自己的观点，不用担心会遭到其他人的嘲笑。
嘲笑.en: Express your views bravely without worrying about being mocked by others.

嘲笑.zh: 当他取得成功时，当年嘲笑过他的人都感到十分惭愧。
嘲笑.en: When he succeeded, those who had mocked him back then felt deeply ashamed.

遮住.zh: 天空中突然刮起了大风，厚厚的乌云遮住了耀眼的太阳。
遮住.en: Strong winds suddenly blew in the sky, and thick dark clouds covered the dazzling sun.

遮住.zh: 她用双手遮住了自己的脸庞，忍不住伤心地哭了起来。
遮住.en: She covered her face with both hands and couldn't help but cry sadly.

遮住.zh: 窗前那棵高大的大树完全遮住了房间里采光用的窗户。
遮住.en: The tall tree in front of the window completely blocked the window used for room lighting.

遮住.zh: 为了不让阳光晒伤皮肤，她戴上了一顶帽子遮住头部。
遮住.en: In order not to let the sunlight burn her skin, she put on a hat to cover her head.

遮住.zh: 繁茂的树叶把小路完全遮住了，让人很难找到正确的方向。
遮住.en: The lush leaves completely covered the trail, making it difficult for people to find the right direction.

弯腰.zh: 看到地上有垃圾，他立刻弯腰把它捡起来扔进垃圾桶。
弯腰.en: Seeing trash on the ground, he immediately bent down to pick it up and threw it into the bin.

弯腰.zh: 爷爷因为腰部受伤，现在很难轻松地弯腰做家务活了。
弯腰.en: Because grandpa injured his waist, it is very difficult for him to easily bend over to do housework now.

弯腰.zh: 农民们在田里辛勤地弯腰插秧，汗水不停地流下来。
弯腰.en: The farmers bent over hard in the field to plant rice seedlings, sweat dripping continuously.

弯腰.zh: 礼貌的侍者弯腰向每一位走进餐厅的客人致以问候。
弯腰.en: The polite waiter bent over to greet every guest who walked into the restaurant.

弯腰.zh: 他弯腰解开系得很紧的鞋带，准备换上一双舒适的拖鞋。
弯腰.en: He bent down to untie his tightly tied shoelaces, preparing to change into a comfortable pair of slippers.

惭愧.zh: 因为自己不小心说错了话，他心里感到十分惭愧和不安。
惭愧.en: Because he accidentally said the wrong thing, he felt extremely ashamed and uneasy in his heart.

惭愧.zh: 意识到自己的错误之后，他低下了头并感到非常惭愧。
惭愧.en: After realizing his mistake, he lowered his head and felt very remorseful.

惭愧.zh: 看到别人都在刻苦学习而自己在玩耍，他感到很惭愧。
惭愧.en: Seeing others studying hard while he was playing, he felt very ashamed.

惭愧.zh: 面对老师温和的关怀与原谅，做错事的他惭愧地哭了。
惭愧.en: Faced with the teacher's gentle care and forgiveness, he wept shamefacedly for doing something wrong.

惭愧.zh: 我没有能够按时完成承诺好的任务，这让我感到很惭愧。
惭愧.en: I was unable to complete the promised task on time, which made me feel very ashamed.

拥有.zh: 能够拥有健康的身体和幸福的家庭是人生最大的财富。
拥有.en: Being able to have a healthy body and a happy family is the greatest wealth in life.

拥有.zh: 经过多年的奋斗，他终于拥有了属于自己的一间小屋。
拥有.en: After years of hard struggle, he finally came to own a small house of his own.

拥有.zh: 这座城市拥有悠久的历史文化以及丰富多彩的旅游资源。
拥有.en: This city possesses a long history and culture as well as rich and colorful tourism resources.

拥有.zh: 我们应该学会珍惜当下所拥有的一切，而不是盲目追求。
拥有.en: We should learn to cherish everything we currently have, rather than blindly pursuing more.

拥有.zh: 他拥有着非常丰富的教学经验，深受全校学生的喜爱。
拥有.en: He possesses a wealth of teaching experience and is deeply loved by all students in the school.

一段.zh: 毕业离别前夕，同学们共同回忆起了那一段美好的童年时光。
一段.en: On the eve of graduation and farewell, classmates recalled that beautiful period of childhood memories together.

一段.zh: 前方有一段道路正在施工，请过往的车辆小心驾驶慢行。
一段.en: A section of the road ahead is under construction; please drive carefully and slowly.

一段.zh: 经过了一段长时间的休息，他的体力终于完全恢复了。
一段.en: After a long period of rest, his physical strength was finally fully restored.

一段.zh: 老师在课堂上朗读了一段感人至深的文章给大家听。
一段.en: The teacher read a deeply moving passage of an article aloud for everyone in class.

一段.zh: 这是一段难忘的经历，它让我学会了如何坚强地面对生活。
一段.en: This is an unforgettable experience; it taught me how to face life with strength.

农夫.zh: 辛勤的农夫每天天还没亮就顶着晨光去田里耕作。
农夫.en: The hardworking farmer head out to till the fields in the morning light every day before dawn.

农夫.zh: 善良的农夫救起了冻伤的小动物，并给它准备了食物。
农夫.en: The kind-hearted farmer rescued the frostbitten small animal and prepared food for it.

农夫.zh: 到了秋天，农夫们看到满田金黄的稻谷，心里充满喜悦。
农夫.en: In autumn, the farmers felt full of joy in their hearts seeing the fields filled with golden rice.

农夫.zh: 那个农夫用自家的农产品热情地招待了迷路的游客们。
农夫.en: That farmer warmly entertained the lost tourists with his own farm produce.

农夫.zh: 无论刮风还是下雨，农夫都细心地照顾着田里的农作物。
农夫.en: Rain or shine, the farmer carefully takes care of the crops in the field.

隐形眼镜.zh: 佩戴隐形眼镜之前，一定要记得先用肥皂洗干净双手。
隐形眼镜.en: Before wearing contact lenses, be sure to remember to wash your hands clean with soap first.

隐形眼镜.zh: 为了运动时更方便，他选择戴隐形眼镜而不是普通眼镜。
隐形眼镜.en: To make exercise more convenient, he chose to wear contact lenses instead of regular glasses.

隐形眼镜.zh: 长时间盯着电脑看，戴着隐形眼镜的眼睛容易感到干涩。
隐形眼镜.en: Looking at the computer for a long time, eyes with contact lenses are prone to feeling dry.

隐形眼镜.zh: 睡觉前一定要把隐形眼镜摘下来并放入护理液中清洗。
隐形眼镜.en: Be sure to take off contact lenses and wash them in solution before going to bed.

隐形眼镜.zh: 第一次尝试戴隐形眼镜时，他花了很长时间才成功戴上。
隐形眼镜.en: When trying to put on contact lenses for the first time, it took him a long time to succeed.

上瘾.zh: 沉迷于玩手机网络游戏非常容易让人上瘾并耽误学习。
上瘾.en: Indulging in playing mobile online games easily makes people addicted and delays their studies.

上瘾.zh: 读书是一件很有趣的事情，一旦习惯了就会彻底上瘾。
上瘾.en: Reading is a very interesting thing; once you get used to it, you will become thoroughly addicted.

上瘾.zh: 这种含糖量极高饮料喝多了容易上瘾，对健康不好。
上瘾.en: Drinking too much of this high-sugar beverage is addictive and bad for health.

上瘾.zh: 父母非常担心孩子会因为过度看电视而慢慢上瘾。
上瘾.en: Parents are very worried that their children will gradually get addicted due to excessive TV watching.

上瘾.zh: 他最近迷上了做手工，越做越上瘾，根本停不下来。
上瘾.en: He has recently become obsessed with crafting, getting more addicted the more he does it, unable to stop.

地址.zh: 请你在快件表格上清楚地填写好收货人的详细地址。
地址.en: Please fill out the detailed address of the recipient clearly on the express delivery form.

地址.zh: 如果你的居住地址发生了变动，请及时前往相关部门更新。
地址.en: If your residential address changes, please go to the relevant department in a timely manner to update it.

地址.zh: 他根据信封上面写的地址，顺利地找到了朋友的新家。
地址.en: Based on the address written on the envelope, he successfully found his friend's new house.

地址.zh: 请不要随随便便把自己的家庭地址透露给不认识的陌生人。
地址.en: Please do not reveal your home address casually to unfamiliar strangers.

地址.zh: 这家网红餐厅的地理地址非常优越，就在市中心附近。
地址.en: The geographical location address of this trending restaurant is very superior, right near the city center.
